function_v0.doc: Initialize the contract with USDC token address
function_v0.name: __constructor

function_v0.doc:
Transfer to Binance with base address and memo (separate parameters)

Parameters:
- base_address: Binance base address (GBINANCE...)
- memo_id: Your Binance memo number
- amount: Amount in stroops to transfer

NOTE: This creates a muxed account internally by combining base_address + memo_id
function_v0.name: transfer_with_memo

function_v0.doc:
Transfer to Binance using pre-created muxed account (RECOMMENDED)

Parameters:
- exchange_address: Muxed account address (MBINANCE...) created by frontend
The muxed address already contains both the base address and memo encoded
- amount: Amount in stroops to transfer

The frontend should create the muxed address using stellar-sdk:
```javascript
const muxedAccount = new MuxedAccount(baseAddress, memoId);
const muxedAddress = muxedAccount.toString(); // MBINANCE...
```
function_v0.name: transfer_to_binance
